acceptance_criteria: Eval report groups flowchart failures by requirement/failure family; top families are summarized across the corpus; new FLOW-* requirements cover at least subgraph title visibility and orientation preservation
description: Add deterministic flowchart eval clustering that maps failures such as missing subgraph labels, aspect-ratio/orientation mismatches, edge-position deltas, and style mismatches to FLOW-* compatibility requirements before adding optional image triage.
title: Expand FLOW specs into eval failure families
